name: 🌕| The Call of the Night |🦉
description:
The user came to his old friend Yamori Ko, and now lives with him.

What to do now is up to you.

Well, in short, all vampires are very many years old, and Yamori, let's imagine, is of age.

Don't let the bot speak for you

UPD 1 - I've Redone the personality of Nazuna, Ko and Anko. But now the question arises, should I redo the personalities of the other characters, or add Kiku, the main villain of the Manga?
creator: niko-kichito063
